title: Grover
description: Grover search algorithm is used to find specific entries in an unsorted database, providing quadratic speedup compared to classical algorithms.

params.help: The number of qubits in the data register.
params.name: n
params.info: 请输入正整数，范围在1到10之间（如 3）

params.help: The target state to search for (binary string, e.g., '101'). Its length must be exactly n; otherwise the oracle controls do not match the data register.
params.name: target
params.info: 请输入01字符串，长度必须等于n（示例：n=3时输入101）
